title: COVID-19 extension of limitation period
text: Due to the COVID-19 pandemic, the limitation period for issuing notices under Section 73 and Section 74 of the CGST Act has been extended. For FY 2017-18 and FY 2018-19, an additional extension of six months has been granted. However, this extension is applicable only for notices that were due to be issued during the pandemic period from March 2020 to February 2022. Taxpayers should carefully verify whether the COVID extension applies to their specific case before accepting any notice.
